description_long: This is an official NFL Super Bowl LVI football, crafted from brown pebbled leather with a distinct grippy texture. The ball features white laces on one seam for grip and control, and prominent printed logos including the Super Bowl LVI emblem, the Wilson brand, and the NFL shield. The text 'THE DUKE' and the commissioner's signature are visible, as well as the words 'NATIONAL FOOTBALL LEAGUE' in yellow on the opposite side. The football has a classic prolate spheroid shape, with four visible panels joined by visible stitching. The surface appears clean and unworn, with all markings crisp and vibrant.
description: A brown leather NFL Super Bowl LVI football with white laces, prominent logos, and a grippy pebbled texture. The ball is clean, new, and features detailed branding and stitching.
description_view_0: The main Super Bowl LVI logo, Wilson branding, and commissioner's signature are clearly visible on the brown leather surface.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the white laces and the seam, with the commissioner's signature and part of the logo visible.
description_view_2: The opposite side displays the NFL shield, 'NATIONAL FOOTBALL LEAGUE' text in yellow, and conference names, with the Wilson logo below.
description_view_3: Another angled view focusing on the laces and seam, with 'THE DUKE' and Wilson branding visible.
